ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* The team the player is currently associated with */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league the team belongs to (e.g., AL/NL) */,
  "level" TEXT /* The level at which the player is playing (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* The age of the player at the time of the season */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side of the player (e.g., R, L, S) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing arm of the player (e.g., R, L) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the season (e.g., 'April to October') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with these statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which these statistics were recorded */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the season */,
  "age_diff" REAL /* Difference in age from the previous season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in the season */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Total plate appearances by the player in the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made by the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles hit by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples hit by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Total runs batted in by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Total times caught stealing by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks received by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage of the player */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases achieved by the player */,
  "grounded_into_double_play" INTEGER /* Total grounded into double plays by the player */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Total times hit by pitch */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice hits by the player */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice flies by the player */,
  "intentional_walks" INTEGER /* Total intentional walks received by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the player as a pitcher */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the player as a pitcher */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned Run Average (ERA) of the player as a pitcher */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs (e.g., AL or NL) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team competes */,
  "ballpark" TEXT /* Name of the team's ballpark */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., American League, National League) */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structure of the league (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., scout, analyst, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date on which the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary specified in the contract */,
  "bonuses" REAL /* Total bonuses specified in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
